ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is currently active */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is banned */,
  "data_create" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "data_published" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was published or activated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address for billing or delivery purposes */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and capabilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string or array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., login, logout, account update) */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user during the activity */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., notification preferences) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  "suspension_start" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the suspension */,
  "suspension_end" TEXT /* End timestamp of the suspension */,
  "suspended_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user (admin) who suspended the account */,
  "suspension_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the suspension */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suspension was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suspension was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_suspended_by FOREIGN KEY ("suspended_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., account update) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user (admin) who sent the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the user */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token for verifying the password reset */,
  "reset_requested_date" TEXT /* Date the reset was requested */,
  "reset_completed_date" TEXT /* Date the reset was completed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the reset request was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user during the reset request */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reset process is completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reset request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrator who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., user activation) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user (admin) who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user during the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., max_login_attempts) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
